Subnautica 2 Guide
MapCreaturesCraftingAI HelpGuides

Creature Database

8 creatures catalogued. Know what lurks in the depths.

Safe

Peeper

Passive · 0 - 100m

The Peeper is a small, fast, herbivorous fish. It is easily identified by its large, single eye and bright orange body.

Safe ShallowsCrash Zone
Dangerous

Stalker

Aggressive · 0 - 150m

The Stalker is an aggressive, shark-like predator found primarily in Kelp Forests. Known for its distinctive elongated snout.

Kelp Forest
Safe

Reefback Leviathan

Leviathan · 50 - 300m

The Reefback Leviathan is a colossal, passive leviathan that carries a miniature ecosystem on its back. Completely harmless to the player.

Grassy PlateausBulb Zone
Dangerous

Boneshark

Aggressive · 150 - 400m

The Boneshark is a highly aggressive predator with a heavily armored body. It charges at prey with surprising speed.

Grand ReefBulb Zone+1
Safe

Bladderfish

Passive · 0 - 100m

The Bladderfish is a small, docile fish with an inflatable bladder. Essential for early-game water production.

Safe ShallowsKelp Forest
Extreme

Reaper Leviathan

Leviathan · 0 - 400m

The Reaper Leviathan is one of the most feared predators on Planet 4546B. Massive, extremely aggressive, and capable of destroying small vehicles.

Crash ZoneMountains+1
Caution

Gasopod

Docile · 0 - 100m

The Gasopod is a slow, docile creature that releases toxic gas pods when threatened. Useful for crafting gas torpedoes.

Safe ShallowsKelp Forest
Caution

Cave Crawler

Aggressive · 0 - 50m

The Cave Crawler is a small, crab-like creature that inhabits islands and caves. Aggressive in groups.

IslandsMountain Island
